headline: Microsoft: Looking Through Legacy Business Noise; Short-Lived Assets Require Elevated Capex
summary: Microsoft outlook: Azure growth, $190B capex, and FY2026 FCF resilience. MSFT's 24x non-GAAP P/E fwd looks cheap. See more details here.
